name: Chicken with Mandarin Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the large roasting chicken in salted water until tender.
2. Remove and bone the chicken, cutting it into pieces.
3. In a separate pan, heat 2 cans of cream of mushroom soup, diluted with the juice from 2 cans of Mandarin oranges.
4. Add half of the sliced Mandarin oranges, along with the sliced mushrooms and water chestnuts.
5. Return the boned and cut-up chicken to the pan.
6. Warm everything together for 30 minutes at a temperature of 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Serve the dish with rice. Makes 6 servings.
